Privacy Policy​​​​​It is our highest priority to provide you K-Corporate Mobile Banking Service (“Service")  We, KASIKORNBANK PUBLIC COMPANY LIMITED   (the “Bank")  have committed to highest respect and protect your privacy rights when you use our Service.  We hereby declare our privacy policy to explain how we collect, use and share  information and to safeguard information of our customers who use our Service.1.

heading_content_part: We may collect your information related to activities and transactions during the session time period such as your account no, transaction type, time, date, financial details of transaction amount and etc We may collect mobile device Identifier , network, connection type and relevant information You may allow us to access mobile number in device contact for your convenience on fund transfers transaction. On your consent, we may collect the exact location of your presence. You may allow us to install our application on your mobile phone storage space and keep e-Slip for reference and share to others on your convenience. You also may allow the camera and photo function for QR-Code features. We also collect and keep log details of information when you are on our service.
